visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black jumper, is holding a large yellow Arm & Hammer laundry detergent bottle. She stands in front of shelves stacked with orange and yellow detergent boxes. A large red and blue Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the detergent bottle's front label, showing the product name and branding. It then shifts to show a bright yellow price tag on the metal warehouse shelf, indicating a price reduction from 599 to 469. (3) The woman is back on screen, pointing her right index finger to a small circular 'HE' logo on the bottom right of the detergent label. She looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression and then gives a clear thumbs-up gesture. (4) A different woman, wearing a blue beret and a white vest over a turquoise turtleneck, is shown holding the same yellow detergent bottle. She stands in a wide warehouse aisle with high shelves in the background. (5) The setting shifts to an indoor living room with soft, warm lighting. A small white Maltese dog is tucked under a brown patterned blanket on a wooden floor. The dog looks calmly at the camera, blinking its eyes. (6) A hand is shown opening and handling a blue cardboard box of Oxi Clean Stain Remover powder. The camera is very close, focusing on the text and branding of the box in what appears to be a bathroom or laundry area.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 心得竟然是...? 限時特價最新鐵錘牌洗衣精. [Slogan]: 2025/03/02. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是他的新包裝. [Slogan]: $469. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後現在有特價. 折了130元. (4) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是因為還有這個He. (5) [Variety]: 洗衣精特價值得買. [Subtitle]: 這張是Oxi, 這還有再加小蘇打粉進去. 所以會洗得再乾淨一點點. (6) [Subtitle]: 但是大家最後我們沒有喜歡那個洗衣精的原因是. (7) [Subtitle]: 1. 他的檸檬味真的有一點重. 洗完以後還是有檸檬味. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後2. 是他的清潔力有點太強. 所以洗完的衣服會有點乾乾的. (9) [Subtitle]: 但是如果你想要洗很髒的浴巾類也是可以考慮的. (10) [Subtitle]: 但這個酵素粉不錯 大家可以另外買放進去就好.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing in separate shots, and one hand shown in a close-up.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black jumper.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a Costco warehouse with high metal shelving units, cardboard boxes of detergent, and bright industrial lighting. The secondary background is a clean home interior with wooden floors and soft domestic lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a steady synthesizer beat. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone introduces a Costco deal. Faint warehouse ambiance is barely audible. (2) A slight rustling sound occurs as the narrator explains the product's new packaging and price discount. The vocal speech rate is moderate and clearly enunciated. (3) The narrator's pitch variability increases as she highlights the 'HE' feature, accompanied by a subtle pop sound effect during a transition. (4) The vocal delivery remains consistent in energy while discussing the addition of baking soda. The BGM maintains its upbeat tempo. (5) The acoustic environment shifts to a quiet indoor room tone as the narrator begins a review section. Her tone becomes slightly lower in arousal as she lists cons like 'strong lemon scent.' (6) A short, dry scraping sound of cardboard is heard as the narrator recommends the enzyme powder separately. The music reaches a clean finish as the narration ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a quick review and shopping tip for Arm & Hammer laundry detergent at Costco. It starts by highlighting a discount to grab attention, explains technical benefits, and then provides a balanced review at home (using a dog as a visual proxy) to mention drawbacks like scent and intensity, finally recommending a separate stain remover.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video presents a balanced review including negative points (lemon scent too strong, cleaning power too intense for some clothes), which typical promotional content avoids.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular short-form 'Costco find' format, leveraging high-energy editing and text overlays to retain attention. The use of the dog in the second half adds a 'cute' factor to the lifestyle review section.
